title: Move topic-memory vector infra into Amplify CDK extension
description: Move standalone topic-memory vector stack from infrastructure/ into dashboard/amplify backend.createStack() extension, and validate staging branch deployment path.

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Implementation progress: added Amplify CDK extension stack at dashboard/amplify/semantic-memory/vector_store_stack.ts and wired it into dashboard/amplify/backend.ts via backend.createStack('TopicMemoryVectorStoreStack'). Environment name now resolves from ENVIRONMENT/AMPLIFY_ENV/AWS_BRANCH.
